general_notes: CRITICALLY IMPORTANT: Find information about the NEXT UPCOMING conference that has NOT YET OCCURRED. You must know today's date to do this. If you cannot find a specific date you must look at past years and estimate based on typical timing - i.e last year's abstract submission deadline was 6 months before the conference, so we estimate that this year's abstract will also be 6 months before the conference whose date we know. Use these guidelines: 1. Only provide information about future conferences that will happen AFTER the current date. 2. If exact dates are not available for upcoming conferences (but it is clear that they are being held), you must look at past years and estimate based on typical timing. 3. If no upcoming conference is detected you can return information about the last conference. This database tracks medical/scientific conferences for abstract submission planning by healthcare professionals and medical writers.

search_groups.description: Basic conference identification including index and full conference name
Comprehensive information about the next upcoming conference
Abstract submission deadlines, notifications, and regulatory information
Poster and presentation guidelines and eligibility
Conference notes and internal planning milestones

validation_targets.description: Sequential row identifier
validation_targets.notes: Auto-generated row counter, not validated

validation_targets.description: Full official name of the conference
validation_targets.notes: Should include full name with acronyms in parentheses - used as primary key
examples: American College of Cardiology (ACC) Annual Scientific Session

validation_targets.description: The name of the next conference that has not yet occurred (usually acronym and year)
validation_targets.notes: Must be for first next c  onference after today's date - Ask yourself what date is it today? Explicitly search for the conference name with upcoming years to see if they exist. Format as acronym + year (e.g., ACC25, ASCO2026)

validation_targets.description: Medical or scientific field/specialty of the conference
validation_targets.notes: Should be specific medical specialty or therapeutic area

validation_targets.description: Official conference website URL for the next upcoming conference
validation_targets.notes: Must be valid URL to official conference website

validation_targets.description: Organization hosting the next conference
validation_targets.notes: Full name or standard acronym of sponsoring organization

validation_targets.description: How often the conference occurs
validation_targets.notes: You can use historical information if no upcoming conference is detected

validation_targets.description: First day of the next conference after today's date
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format for upcoming conference

validation_targets.description: Last day of the next conference after today's date
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format for upcoming conference

validation_targets.description: City and country where the next conference is held
validation_targets.notes: Format as City, State/Country - must be for next upcoming conference

validation_targets.description: Last day to submit abstracts for next conference after today's date
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format - this is critical field, provide estimate using past years relative to conference date if exact date unavailable

validation_targets.description: Date when abstract acceptance notifications are sent for next conference
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format, estimate based on historical patterns if needed

validation_targets.description: Whether late breaker abstracts are accepted for next conference
validation_targets.notes: Yes/No or descriptive text about availability

validation_targets.description: Deadline for late breaker abstracts for next conference
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format or N/A if not applicable

validation_targets.description: Whether previously presented work can be submitted
validation_targets.notes: Yes/No or descriptive policy text

validation_targets.description: Where accepted abstracts from the conference are published
validation_targets.notes: Name of associated journal or publication venue
examples: Journal of the American College of Cardiology

validation_targets.description: Impact factor of the associated publication
validation_targets.notes: Numeric value representing journal impact factor

validation_targets.description: Expected number of conference attendees for next conference
validation_targets.notes: Integer value, use historical data if next conference estimate unavailable

validation_targets.description: Who can submit/present abstracts at the conference
validation_targets.notes: Policy description for submission eligibility

validation_targets.description: Deadline for uploading poster materials for next conference
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format

validation_targets.description: Specific requirements and guidelines for poster presentations
validation_targets.notes: Brief description of poster requirements or link to guidelines
examples: recorded presentation and poster recommended upload Nov 12. https://www.hematology.org/meetings/annual-meeting

validation_targets.description: Any restrictions on industry/pharmaceutical company participation
validation_targets.notes: Description of industry-related restrictions or policies
examples: Pharma employees allowed as authors but not presenters

validation_targets.description: Additional important information about the conference relevant to medical writers
validation_targets.notes: Free-form text for critical conference details not captured elsewhere. Include information about upcoming conference availability.
examples: No upcoming conferences identified! Dates are mostly from the past.
Abstract submission for registered attendees - date to be identified
Information for the next conference is not yet available

validation_targets.description: Calculated date 12 weeks before abstract submission deadline
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format - internal planning milestone

validation_targets.description: Calculated date 6 weeks before abstract submission deadline
validation_targets.notes: Must be in YYYY-MM-DD format - internal planning milestone
